NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT SIGNED THE ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS AWARDING $65,030.90, PLUS $1556.25 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES AND $540 IN COSTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL S. BROME OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510)337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the Order Confirming Arbitration Award submitted with the moving papers awarding $65,030.90, plus $1556.25 in reasonable attorneys fees and $540 in costs. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
